candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs on the income statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; acceptable fallback when a dedicated interest expense line is unavailable.

candidates.why: Only a subset of interest expense related to lease liabilities, so not preferred as the main XINT mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subset of lease interest, not preferred for total interest expense.

variables.notes: Using a priority list: dedicated interest expense first, then broad financial expense as fallback. Excluded lease-interest subset rows to avoid understating or partially capturing XINT.
